name: Filled Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg, milk, and vanilla extract to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Gradually add the flour and mix until a dough forms.
4. Chill the dough in the refrigerator for about 30 minutes or until firm enough to handle.
5. Roll out the chilled dough on a floured surface to your desired thickness.
6. Cut into cookies using a cookie cutter.
7. Place a teaspoon of raisin filling in the center of half the cookies.
8. Cover the filled cookies with the remaining dough rounds.
9. Use the tines of a fork to gently press the edges together, sealing them.
10. Place the cookies on a greased baking sheet.
11. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
